heading: SEQUOIA AND YOSEMITE NATIONAL PARKS
label: VI SEQUOIA AND YOSEMITE NATIONAL PARKS
notes: General Grant National Park AbolishedGeneral Grant National Park was abolished and lands transferred to Kings Canyon National Park, see .section 80a of this title
